objective: Integrate Aggregator core_i18n_viewer features (pre-recorded audio, sentence-level highlight, grammar notes) into lingo-frontend-web stable branch.

parallel_groups.note: Audio playback modification and highlight widget can be built in parallel
Grammar panel UI and asset bundling can be done in parallel

prerequisites.hard_blocker: None — all data assets already exist in content-ko
prerequisites.soft_dependency: TTS-04/05 (premium audio) would replace Edge-TTS MP3s, but current Edge-TTS files are sufficient for Phase 1

tasks.title: 建立 AudioTimelineModel / Audio Timeline Data Model
tasks.goal: Create a Freezed model to parse .sentences.json timeline data.
actions: Create lib/features/study/domain/models/audio_timeline.dart
Define AudioTimeline (id, full_text, sentences) and SentenceSegment (text, start_ms, duration_ms)
Use @freezed + @JsonKey for serialization
Add unit test to verify parsing of sample .sentences.json
acceptance: AudioTimeline.fromJson() correctly parses sample .sentences.json
SentenceSegment has start_ms, duration_ms, text fields
Build passes with no errors

tasks.title: 建立 PrerecordedAudioService / Pre-recorded Audio Player
tasks.goal: Create a service that plays MP3 files and emits current sentence index based on timeline data.
actions: Add `just_audio` or `audioplayers` dependency to pubspec.yaml (evaluate which supports macOS+web+mobile)
Create lib/core/services/prerecorded_audio_service.dart
Implement playTurn(audioPath, timelinePath) method
Parse .sentences.json via AudioTimeline model
Use audio position stream + timeline to emit Stream<SentencePlaybackState> (currentSentenceIndex, isPlaying)
Implement stop(), pause(), seekToSentence(index) methods
Convention-based path resolution: turn ID + speaker → audio path
acceptance: Can play an MP3 from assets
Stream correctly emits sentence index changes as audio plays
seekToSentence(1) jumps to correct timestamp
Graceful fallback if audio file not found

tasks.title: 整合 _playTurnAudio() / Integrate into EventOccurrenceScreen
tasks.goal: Modify EventOccurrenceScreen to use PrerecordedAudioService when audio files exist, falling back to TTS.
actions: In _playTurnAudio(), check if prerecorded audio exists for current turn
Use convention: construct path from turn.id + turn.speaker + learningLanguage
If file exists → use PrerecordedAudioService.playTurn()
If file doesn't exist → fallback to existing TTS logic
Wire up PrerecordedAudioService lifecycle (init/dispose)
Pass sentence state stream to dialogue adapter for highlighting
acceptance: A1-01 lessons play prerecorded audio instead of TTS
Lessons without audio files still use TTS (no regression)
Audio stops when navigating away

tasks.title: 建立句子高亮 Widget / Sentence Highlight Widget
tasks.goal: Create a widget that highlights the currently playing sentence, mirroring viewer's .sentence-wrap.highlight behavior.
actions: Create lib/features/study/presentation/widgets/event/sentence_highlight_text.dart
Accept text, List<SentenceSegment>, and currentSentenceIndex
Split text into sentence spans based on SentenceSegment.text boundaries
Apply highlight style (yellow background with animation) to active sentence
Support tap-on-sentence to seek audio to that sentence's start_ms
Integrate into StandardDialogueAdapter.buildView()
acceptance: Active sentence is visually highlighted (animated background)
Highlight moves as audio progresses through sentences
Tapping a sentence seeks audio to that position
Graceful fallback: if no timeline data, display text normally without highlighting

tasks.title: 搬運 A1 音檔至前端 / Bundle A1 Audio Assets
tasks.goal: Copy A1 audio files and sentence metadata from content-ko to lingo-frontend-web assets.
actions: Copy content-ko/assets/audio/A1-01/*.mp3 to lingo-frontend-web/assets/audio/A1-01/
Copy content-ko/assets/audio/A1-01/*.sentences.json to same directory
Repeat for A1-02 (if ready)
Update pubspec.yaml to include assets/audio/ in flutter assets
Verify total added size (estimate ~5MB for A1-01)
acceptance: All A1-01 MP3 files load successfully via rootBundle
.sentences.json files parse correctly via AudioTimeline.fromJson()
flutter build macos still succeeds
tasks.open_question: Bundle A1-01 only for PoC, or all A1 lessons? Decision affects app size by ~5MB per lesson.

tasks.title: 建立 GrammarNote Model + Service
tasks.goal: Create data model and service for loading grammar notes by lesson ID.
actions: Create lib/features/study/domain/models/grammar_note.dart — Freezed model with grammar_id, title, learner_lang, explanation_md
Create lib/core/services/grammar_note_service.dart
Implement loadForLesson(lessonId) — scans assets for matching grammar JSON files by naming convention ko__g__{level}__{lesson}__*.json
Return List<GrammarNote> sorted by filename
Cache results per lesson
acceptance: GrammarNote.fromJson() parses zh_tw grammar JSON correctly
loadForLesson('A1-01') returns 4-6 grammar notes
explanation_md field contains valid Markdown with tables

tasks.title: 建立 Grammar Notes 面板 / Grammar Notes Panel UI
tasks.goal: Create a UI panel to display grammar notes with Markdown rendering.
actions: Add flutter_markdown dependency to pubspec.yaml
Create lib/features/study/presentation/widgets/event/grammar_notes_panel.dart
Use ExpansionTile / Accordion for each grammar note section
Render explanation_md via MarkdownBody widget
Support Markdown tables (may need markdown: ^7.0.0 for table extension)
Style consistent with app theme (dark mode support)
acceptance: Grammar notes render correctly with headers, tables, bold text
Each note is collapsible via ExpansionTile
Dark mode and light mode both render cleanly
Korean and Chinese characters display correctly

tasks.title: 整合 Grammar 入口 / Integrate Grammar Entry Point
tasks.goal: Add a grammar notes button to EventOccurrenceScreen that opens the grammar panel.
actions: Add 📝 icon button to EventTopBar
On tap → show DraggableScrollableSheet (bottom sheet) with GrammarNotesPanel
Pass current lesson ID to GrammarNoteService.loadForLesson()
Bottom sheet should be dismissible and not block dialogue interaction
acceptance: 📝 button appears in event top bar
Tapping shows grammar notes for current lesson
Bottom sheet is scrollable and dismissible
Grammar notes load even when audio is playing (no conflict)

tasks.title: 搬運 Grammar JSON 至前端 / Bundle Grammar Assets
tasks.goal: Copy zh_tw grammar note JSON files into Flutter assets.
actions: Copy content-ko/content/i18n/zh_tw/grammar/*.json to lingo-frontend-web/assets/content/grammar/
Update pubspec.yaml to include assets/content/grammar/
Verify total file count and size (~333 files, estimated ~150KB total)
Create a grammar_manifest.json listing all available grammar files per lesson (for runtime discovery without filesystem scan)
acceptance: Grammar JSON files load correctly via rootBundle
grammar_manifest.json correctly maps lesson IDs to their grammar files
Total added size ≤ 200KB
tasks.design_notes: Flutter cannot scan asset directories at runtime. A manifest file is needed to discover available grammar files per lesson.

tasks.title: 建立 AssetResolver / Unified Asset Path Resolver
tasks.goal: Create a unified service for resolving asset paths (local bundle vs remote download).

tasks.title: 按需下載機制 / On-demand Asset Download
tasks.goal: Implement on-demand downloading for A2/B1 assets from Firebase Storage.

notes: Phase 1 (FVI-01~05) and Phase 2 (FVI-06~09) can be developed in parallel — they share no code dependencies.
The key insight: audio path can be derived by convention (turn_id + speaker), avoiding schema changes to Turn model.
Grammar notes require a manifest file because Flutter cannot scan asset directories at runtime.
All data formats are already validated by the Aggregator core_i18n_viewer — zero upstream changes needed.
Phase 3 is deferred until Phase 1+2 prove the UX value in the stable branch.
